hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 590 m from property

snippets.snippet: Staff service is excellent, the room is spacious and clean.
A good location, clean room and enjoyable food.
The best business hotel in the city center
Alhamdulillahhh dapat upgrade kamar dari deluxe ke family.
All hotel facilities is good and above my expectations.
Great location, near by Masjid Raya Baiturrahman.
Breakfast buffet was nice and good spread of Acehnese food.
A well-located Hotel with Great Hospitality in Banda Aceh
One of the best hotel l have ever stayed
Enjoy stay here and location near to main ikon of Aceh
I would definitely stay here again and recommend to others.
Overall im a happy customer to check in in this hotel.
Fasilitas di kamar cukup lengkap dan kondisi kamar bersih.
Great Location, Clean and spacious room
Near center of aceh, very clean room and good service
All in all, perfect hotel for travellers.
Near to all facilities like mosques, banks, restaurants etc

hotelReviewSummaryFromAi.positive: Guests love the clean and spacious rooms, equipped with everything needed for a comfortable stay. The hotel is located in the heart of the city, surrounded by many fast food restaurants and a supermarket nearby, making it easy for guests to find something to eat. The staffs are friendly and always willing to help. Overall, guests have enjoyed their stay and also mentioned the delicious food served.
hotelReviewSummaryFromAi.negative: Breakfast spread is limited with few options available, which may not satisfy guests.

address.address1: Jl. Tengku H. Mohd. daud Beureueh No.5 Kuta Alam

description.short: Muraya Hotel Aceh places two travelers in the heart of Banda Aceh, a short 10-minute walk from the iconic Baiturrahman Grand Mosque and local eateries. Spacious rooms with air conditioning, in-room safes and refreshing showers deliver a comfortable base; select rooms offer city or outdoor views. On-site dining serves Acehnese specialties and gourmet options, while a stylish bar offers craft cocktails. Additional conveniences include in-room dining and rental bicycles to explore coastal markets and nearby sights. Ideal for friends or colleagues seeking central, convenient accommodations. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

Dear Guest, Thank you for the great review of our hotel! We are glad that you enjoyed your stay and hope to see you again very soon.
